mapper.select: SELECT TCSD.TAX_AMOUNT,TCSD.AMOUNT,TCSD.RATE_ITEM_CODE, TCSD.RATE_ITEM_NAME,TCSD.UNIT_CODE,TCSD.UNIT_NAME,TCSD."NUMBER",TCSD.REMARK,TCSD.RATE, TCSD.NUMBER2,TCSD.TAX,TCST.SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_COST_STATEMENT TCST LEFT JOIN T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL TCSD ON TCST.ID = TCSD.STATEMENT WHERE TCST.SHIPVOYAGE_ID =#{shipvoyageId}
